column3: stop-hub.cjs taskLines includes ALL tasks (complete + incomplete) in block reason, causing completed tasks to appear in display alongside active ones
column6: Line 181 pushes taskStatusLine for every active task regardless of done status. Line 196 joins ALL taskLines into reasonParts. Block reason becomes "✅ done-task: DONE | 🔄 active-task: 150/500" — completed tasks clutter the block message.
